popular_repos.name: sheaf-mpnn
popular_repos.description: A clean PyTorch / PyG implementation library of Sheaf Neural Networks as Message Passing comprising all variants and a benchmark suite with 14+ Datasets.

popular_repos.name: AMR_CleaningRobot
popular_repos.description: Simulation of a Cleaning Robot with the capability of performing SLAM of the environment the robot is navigating, Planning Trajectories to calculate optimal paths considering static and dynamic obstacles, and Dynamic Obstacle Avoidance to detect and navigate around obstacles.

popular_repos.name: BioHeat-PINNs
popular_repos.description: Improving hyperthermia treatment by controlling temperature distribution in both 1D and 2D domains and thermal energy applied to cutaneous and subcutaneous tissues, through Bio-Heat equation with Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs).

popular_repos.name: RealTime-VLM
popular_repos.description: RealTime-VLM brings real-time VLM inference to the browser. It continuously captures webcam frames, sends image+text to an OpenAI-compatible API, and displays responses with sub-second latency. Works with local or hosted VLMs.

popular_repos.name: MoonBot-Navigation
popular_repos.description: Autonomous robot for lunar navigation and object interaction, developed during TESP '25 at the Space Robotics Lab (Tohoku University). Features custom robot design, Dijkstra-based path planning, object detection with vision, and gripper control.

popular_repos.name: RoboMAT
popular_repos.description: A comprehensive MATLAB library for solving a wide range of robotics tasks, providing tools and functions for robotic simulations, control systems, kinematics, and path planning.

popular_repos.name: Z-SASLM
popular_repos.description: [CVPR 2025]  Z-SASLM is a zero-shot framework for multi-style image synthesis leveraging Spherical Linear Interpolation (SLI) to achieve smooth, coherent blending—without any fine-tuning.

popular_repos.name: XGNN-GraphGenRL
popular_repos.description: Explainable Graph Neural Networks (XGNNs) and Reinforcement Learning (RL) techniques for graph generation and optimization tasks. The project aims to explore and validate the use of explainable AI for creating interpretable graph structures.

popular_repos.name: AdaViT
popular_repos.description: Adaptive Vision Transformer for efficient image classification, implementing dynamic token sparsification to reduce computational costs while maintaining accuracy.

popular_repos.name: Z-SAMB_StyleAligned_MultiReference-MultiModal
popular_repos.description: Novel framework for Zero-Shot Style Alignment in Text-to-Image generation, incorporating Multi-Modal Context-Awareness and Multi-Reference Style Alignment, using minimal attention sharing, ensuring consistent style transfer without fine-tuning.

popular_repos.name: SkinMe
popular_repos.description: A deep learning-based application for skin disease detection and classification.

popular_repos.name: ALPR-Automatic-License-Plate-Recognition
popular_repos.description: A comprehensive system for detecting and recognizing license plates in real-time, combining image processing, object detection, and optical character recognition (OCR) to provide an accurate and efficient solution for automatic license plate recognition, with also double GUI, both for the Security Manager and for the Car User.
